data.body: Scrutiny pipeline complete: Gap Analysis (9 patterns from 818-bug corpus), Web Research (LangGraph #6491 / #536, Temporal validators, metaswarm, CrewAI, AutoGen), Scenario Analysis (2 pressure-test rounds, 8 gaps folded), Fidelity Review 2 cycles — Agent Clarity 4/4, Scope 4/4/4/4, Value 4/4 (all PASS). Note: scrutiny:pending tag was applied at create per prior plan but semantically should be cleared; downstream consumers should treat this ticket as scrutiny-complete.
